title: cotoneaster cotoneaster subvar. leucocarpus
intro: Cotoneaster cotoneaster subvar. leucocarpus, commonly known as the white-fruited cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its small white berries and silvery-green foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cotoneaster cotoneaster subvar. leucocarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
